evidence_label: benchmark refresh and novelty gate, not treatment advice

benchmark_set.label: EDIT-301 / reni-cel Cas12a HBG promoter editing
benchmark_set.role: global clinical HBG1/HBG2 promoter editing benchmark

benchmark_set.label: VGB-Ex01 Cas12b HBG promoter editing
benchmark_set.role: registry comparator for HBG promoter editing and HbF logic

blocked_claims: HbF rescue is novel by itself
A non-editing candidate is cure-oriented evidence only because it may raise HbF
required_non_editing_gap: HbF or HBG plus alpha-globin or autophagy readouts
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane-safety stop
decision_rule: Any candidate that only claims HbF induction or HBG/HbF restoration is novelty-blocked. Keep only candidates that answer the affordability or low-infrastructure gap and can pass multi-endpoint assay gates.
public_boundary: This workflow does not provide diagnosis, dosing, eligibility, referral, trial-screening, import, purchase, or treatment advice.
